message:
fix: check DND/muted state before sending nudges in mail, broadcast, and channel paths (gt-3fk1m)

Three notification paths bypassed DND checks that the standalone gt nudge
command properly enforced. Added shouldNudgeTarget/isRecipientMuted checks
to: mail router notifyRecipient, broadcast loop, and channel nudge loop.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
